title: UI: compose bar and message send
description:
## Why
The user needs to be able to send messages.

## What
- Single-line text input at the bottom of the message panel
- Enter to send via Message/set create (chatId, body, bodyType text/plain, sentAt now)
- Clear input on successful send
- Show send error inline (do not panic)
- Disable send when no chat selected or body is empty
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
